candidates.why: Represents the company’s primary operating revenue stream; values match total operating revenues, indicating it is effectively the core revenue line.
Explicit total revenue line that aggregates all operating revenues; best single representation of top-line revenue.

variables.notes: Using 'Total operating revenues' as primary revenue measure with 'Time charter revenues' as a fallback prior-year label if needed.

candidates.why: Direct costs of operating vessels; in a shipping company this is a core cost of services sold.
Voyage expenses and commissions are variable costs directly tied to generating voyage revenues, fitting COGS definition.
These are overhead SG&A, not direct production costs, so should be excluded from COGS.
Financial item, not a cost of goods sold.
Financial item, not a cost of goods sold.

candidates.row_label: Prepaid expenses and other current assets
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not a period COGS expense.
Balance sheet asset, not a period COGS expense.
Liability account, not the expense line itself.
Liability account, not the expense line itself.

variables.notes: Mapped COGS to the two direct operating cost lines: vessel operating expenses and voyage expenses & commissions, which together represent direct service costs in shipping.

candidates.why: Direct operating costs; should be treated as COGS, not SG&A.
Clearly labeled overhead/administrative costs; classic SG&A component.

variables.notes: Selected only 'General and administrative expenses' as SG&A; vessel operating expenses are treated as COGS.
No research and development-related line items appear in the provided income statement; treating R&D expense as zero.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Primary income statement line for interest expense after capitalized interest adjustment; best measure of interest cost.
Alternative label for interest expense before capitalized interest; useful as a fallback if net-of-capitalized line is missing in some years.
Represents interest capitalized to assets, not period expense; should not be mapped to XINT.
Balance sheet item, not the period interest expense.
Liability for interest owed, not the expense line itself.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Provided both net and gross interest expense as a priority list; capitalized interest and balance sheet interest accounts are excluded.

candidates.why: Income statement item, not equity; not appropriate for book equity mapping.
Asset representing investments, not shareholders’ equity.
Explicit total shareholders’ equity line; best representation of book equity attributable to owners.
Duplicate of 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' with identical values; either could serve as book equity.
Balance sheet total including liabilities; not pure equity and should not be used for BE.

variables.notes: Using the explicit 'Shareholders' Equity - Total' line as book equity; non-controlling interests are not separately reported.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
candidates.why: Income statement subtotal, not a balance sheet minority interest/equity line; cannot be used for MIB.

variables.notes: No balance sheet line for non-controlling/minority interests is present; treating MIB as zero.
